mapper.sql: id, category_id, question_type, title, difficulty, score, correct_answer, answer_analysis, knowledge_points, tags, source, status, creator_id, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET category_id = #{categoryId}, question_type = #{questionType}, title = #{title}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, score = #{score}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, answer_analysis = #{answerAnalysis}, knowledge_points = #{knowledgePoints}, tags = #{tags}, source = #{source}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM question WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
